svg.title: The Empress — Portrait Bust · Major Arcana III
svg.desc: The Empress rendered as an intimate icon portrait: a crowned priestess in three-quarter view with a twelve-star crown, gold engraving linework, a radiant halo, the Venus symbol at her breast, and a band of fertility iconography below. Rendered on deep navy in jewel-tone gold, in the Mystic Cartography style — medieval astrological manuscript meets Byzantine icon panel.
